topTargets.name: Malachi Fields
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #4 overall (DoT 87.2, Starter grade) with a Nico Collins comp — exactly the kind of size/speed Waldman-anointed prospect a high-RSP-affinity GM targets at 1.05. Likely to slip past the top 4 (Tate/Love/Lemon/Mendoza or Fields swap) and represents best player available per the board Maverick actually reads.

topTargets.name: KC Concepcion
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #5 (DoT 86.3, Starter grade) and ADP 13.57 — a flanker/slot fit that Waldman explicitly grades as first-round value. If Fields is gone at 1.05, Concepcion is the next RSP-anointed name on the board and an easy pivot.

topTargets.name: Emmett Johnson
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #8 (DoT 84.6) with a Harold Fannin trajectory comp — Maverick's roster has only 4 RBs vs 10 WRs, so 2.05 is the natural place to address the thinnest skill room with a Waldman favorite who is undervalued vs MFL ADP.

topTargets.name: Demond Claiborne
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #9 (DoT 84.5, LeSean McCoy comp) labeled a second-round rookie pick regardless of weight concerns — fits the 2.05 slot perfectly and addresses the RB shortage. High-RSP-affinity GM trusts the board over ADP noise.

topTargets.name: Eli Stowers
topTargets.reasoning: RSP #11 (DoT 84.4, classic move TE on cusp of Starter tier) — Maverick is rostering only 1 TE and Stowers at 3.05 is a Waldman-endorsed positional fix at a need spot. Cap-friendly third-rounder fits the $10.3M space without forcing taxi.

capPosture: Workable: $10.3M space with 5 expiring contracts — can absorb a 1st-round rookie on active roster and stash later picks on taxi at 50% cost.

wildcard.name: Myles Montgomery
wildcard.reasoning: RSP #13 explicitly tagged the MOST UNDERRATED skill talent in the 2026 class — a high-RSP-affinity GM who reads Waldman religiously is exactly the type to gamble a 3.05 or taxi spot on this Hula Bowl standout despite likely UDFA status.

summary: Maverick is a Waldman disciple drafting from a WR-glutted, RB-thin roster with comfortable cap room. Expect a best-RSP-available WR at 1.05 (Fields or Concepcion), then a hard pivot to RB in round 2 (Emmett Johnson or Claiborne), and a Waldman-favorite TE or sleeper RB at 3.05. RSP grade will trump consensus ADP at every turn.
